title: Urgent Help
excerpt: When disaster strikes, we're your emergency response team. Our rapid-response unit provides immediate incident response, breach containment, and crisis management.
content:
Need immediate help with a cyber incident? Our emergency response team is available 24/7 to help you contain breaches, minimize damage, and recover quickly.

We understand that every minute counts during a cyber attack. Our rapid-response experts will guide you through the crisis with clear, actionable steps.

acf.shortDescription: When disaster strikes, we're your emergency response team. Our rapid-response unit provides immediate incident response, breach containment, and crisis management.
acf.heroSubheadline: If you're experiencing a cyber attack or security breach, we're here to help immediately.

benefits.title: 24/7 Availability
benefits.description: Our emergency response team is always on call

benefits.title: Rapid Response
benefits.description: We begin containment within hours of contact

benefits.title: Expert Guidance
benefits.description: Experienced incident responders guide you through the crisis

painPoints.title: Active Breach
painPoints.description: Currently experiencing unauthorized access or data theft

painPoints.title: Compromised Email
painPoints.description: Business email compromise or phishing attack

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond?
faqs.answer: We aim to begin incident response within hours of your call. For active incidents, time is critical.

faqs.question: What should I do right now?
faqs.answer: Don't turn off systems unless data is actively being destroyed. Document what you see. Call us immediately.

title: Cyber Maturity Assessments
excerpt: Know exactly where you stand—and where you need to go.
content:
Our Cyber Maturity Assessment provides a comprehensive evaluation of your organization's security capabilities, helping you understand where you stand and what steps to take next.

We benchmark your security practices against frameworks like NIST, ISO 27001, and the Australian Essential Eight, giving you a clear roadmap for improvement.

acf.shortDescription: We evaluate your organization's current cybersecurity posture against industry standards and best practices, identifying strengths, weaknesses, and actionable areas for improvement.
acf.heroSubheadline: Comprehensive security assessments that give you a clear roadmap for improvement.

benefits.title: Clear Security Baseline
benefits.description: Understand your current security posture with detailed benchmarking

benefits.title: Prioritized Recommendations
benefits.description: Get actionable steps ranked by risk and impact

benefits.title: Compliance Alignment
benefits.description: Ensure alignment with industry frameworks and regulations

painPoints.title: Unknown Vulnerabilities
painPoints.description: Not knowing where your security gaps are

rightForYou.item: You need to understand your current security posture
You're preparing for compliance audits
You want to prioritize security investments
You're concerned about unknown vulnerabilities

faqs.question: How long does an assessment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 2-4 weeks depending on organization size and complexity.

faqs.question: What frameworks do you assess against?
faqs.answer: We benchmark against NIST, ISO 27001, Essential Eight, and industry-specific standards.

faqs.question: Will this disrupt our operations?
faqs.answer: No, assessments are designed to be minimally invasive to daily operations.

title: Technical Advisory Services
excerpt: Expert guidance to navigate complex security decisions with confidence.
content:
Make informed cybersecurity decisions with expert guidance. Our Technical Advisory Services provide strategic insights on architecture, risk management, and compliance.

Whether you're evaluating new security technologies, developing policies, or navigating regulatory requirements, our advisors bring clarity to complex decisions.

acf.shortDescription: Our experts provide strategic guidance on cybersecurity architecture, risk management, compliance, and emerging threats to help you make informed decisions.
acf.heroSubheadline: Navigate complex security decisions with confidence.

benefits.title: Strategic Direction
benefits.description: Clear guidance on security investments and priorities

benefits.title: Risk-Based Decisions
benefits.description: Make informed choices based on your risk profile

painPoints.title: Complex Decisions
painPoints.description: Unsure which security technologies to invest in

painPoints.title: Policy Development
painPoints.description: Need help creating security policies and procedures

painPoints.title: Emerging Threats
painPoints.description: Struggling to keep up with evolving threat landscape

rightForYou.item: You need expert guidance on security architecture
You're evaluating new security technologies
You need help developing security policies
You want to understand emerging threats

formBenefits.benefit: Strategic insights tailored to your business

faqs.question: What topics do you advise on?
faqs.answer: Architecture, risk management, compliance, vendor selection, and emerging threats.

faqs.question: How is advisory different from assessment?
faqs.answer: Advisory is ongoing strategic guidance, while assessment is a point-in-time evaluation.

title: Engineering Support
excerpt: Hands-on expertise to implement and optimise your security infrastructure.
content:
Get hands-on technical expertise for your security infrastructure. Our engineers help implement, configure, and optimize security technologies across your environment.

From network defense and endpoint protection to cloud security and SIEM deployment, we ensure your security tools work effectively together.

acf.shortDescription: We deliver hands-on technical support for implementing and optimizing security technologies, including network defense, endpoint protection, and cloud security.
acf.heroSubheadline: Hands-on expertise to implement and optimise your security infrastructure.

benefits.title: Hands-On Implementation
benefits.description: Expert deployment and configuration of security tools

benefits.title: Optimized Performance
benefits.description: Ensure your security stack works at peak efficiency

benefits.title: Integrated Defense
benefits.description: Coordinated security across all your systems

painPoints.title: Misconfigured Tools
painPoints.description: Security tools not working as expected

painPoints.title: Integration Issues
painPoints.description: Difficulty getting systems to work together

rightForYou.item: You need help implementing security technologies
Your security tools aren't working as expected
You want to optimize your security stack
You need integration support

faqs.question: What technologies do you support?
faqs.answer: Firewalls, endpoint protection, SIEM, cloud security, identity management, and more.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both project-based and ongoing managed support options.

title: Cyber Awareness Training
excerpt: Turn your biggest vulnerability into your strongest defence.
content:
Your employees are your first line of defense. Our Cyber Awareness Training transforms your team from a security vulnerability into a security asset.

Through engaging, practical training sessions, we teach your staff to recognize threats, respond appropriately, and maintain secure practices in their daily work.

acf.shortDescription: We design and deliver tailored training programs to educate employees on cyber risks, safe online practices, phishing prevention, and incident response.
acf.heroSubheadline: Turn your biggest vulnerability into your strongest defence.

benefits.title: Human Firewall
benefits.description: Transform employees into security-conscious team members

benefits.title: Incident Awareness
benefits.description: Staff know how to respond when something goes wrong

painPoints.title: Lack of Awareness
painPoints.description: Staff don't know security best practices

rightForYou.item: Your employees handle sensitive data
You've experienced phishing attempts
Staff aren't aware of security best practices
You want to reduce human error risks

faqs.question: How long are training sessions?
faqs.answer: Sessions range from 1-hour awareness talks to full-day workshops depending on depth required.

faqs.question: Can training be customized for our industry?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We tailor content to your industry's specific threats and compliance requirements.

faqs.question: Do you offer phishing simulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide realistic phishing simulations to test and reinforce training.

title: vCISO Services
excerpt: Executive security leadership without the executive price tag.
content:
Access senior cybersecurity leadership without the executive salary. Our Virtual CISO service provides strategic security oversight, governance, and program management tailored to your organization's needs.

Our vCISOs become an extension of your leadership team, providing board-level reporting, vendor management, and security strategy development.

acf.shortDescription: Get executive-level cybersecurity leadership without the full-time cost. Our Virtual CISOs provide strategic oversight, governance, and security program management.
acf.heroSubheadline: Executive security leadership without the executive price tag.

benefits.title: Cost-Effective Leadership
benefits.description: Executive expertise at a fraction of full-time cost

benefits.title: Board Communication
benefits.description: Clear security reporting for leadership and board

painPoints.title: Full-Time CISO Cost
painPoints.description: Can't justify $300K+ for a full-time security executive

painPoints.title: Lack of Strategy
painPoints.description: No long-term security roadmap or governance

painPoints.title: Board Questions
painPoints.description: Struggling to communicate security to leadership

rightForYou.item: You need executive security leadership
A full-time CISO isn't cost-effective
You need board-level security reporting
You want strategic security planning

faqs.question: How much time does a vCISO dedicate to us?
faqs.answer: Engagement levels vary from a few hours per week to several days per month based on your needs.

faqs.question: Will the vCISO attend board meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes, our vCISOs can present to boards and provide executive-level security reporting.

faqs.question: How does pricing work?
faqs.answer: We offer flexible retainer arrangements based on the level of involvement required.
